description: Backup failure on Oct 22 due to storage controller firmware crash on oc-bkp-vol-02. Vendor (NetApp) support engaged. Controller replaced under warranty. No re-run executed for this backup cycle.
compensating_controls: WAL archiving confirmed continuously operational during incident window. WAL segments archived every 10-12 minutes to us-west-2. Point-in-time recovery capability maintained with effective RPO of approximately 12 minutes. Storage controller replaced by vendor within 8 hours. Next scheduled backup (Oct 23) succeeded normally.
notes: Firmware crash was isolated hardware event. NetApp confirmed firmware version 12.4.1 had known bug under specific I/O patterns. Updated to 12.4.3. Remediation: implement firmware auto-update policy for all backup storage controllers. Infrastructure team to configure NetApp AutoSupport monitoring by Nov 15 2025.
